name: Free Spins
description: Free spins / free games bonus round

name: Pick Bonus
description: Pick-an-object bonus round

name: Wheel Bonus
description: Spin-the-wheel bonus round

name: Trail Bonus
description: Trail/board game style bonus round

name: Cascading Reels
description: Winning symbols removed, new ones fall in

name: Megaways
description: BTG Megaways engine -- variable symbols per reel, up to 117,649 ways

name: Cluster Pays
description: Wins formed by adjacent clusters, not paylines

name: Nudge
description: Reels nudge up or down to form wins

name: Progressive Jackpot
description: Jackpot pool that grows with play across players

name: Fixed Jackpot
description: Static jackpot tiers (e.g., Mini/Minor/Major/Grand)

name: Must-Hit-By Jackpot
description: Jackpot guaranteed to trigger before a threshold

name: Win Both Ways
description: Pays left-to-right AND right-to-left

name: Hold And Win
description: Hold symbols in place, respin remaining reels to collect more

name: Cash On Reels
description: Symbols display credit/cash values that can be collected

name: Collector
description: Collection meter fills up to trigger a reward

name: Bonus Buy
description: Option to purchase/buy direct entry to bonus round

name: Gamble Feature
description: Risk/double-or-nothing game after a win (includes ladder)

name: Expanding Wilds
description: Wild symbols expand to cover entire reel

name: Sticky Wilds
description: Wild symbols stay in place for subsequent spins/respins

name: Walking Wilds
description: Wild symbols move one position each spin

name: Stacked Wilds
description: Wild symbols stacked vertically on reels

name: Respin
description: Single or limited respins (NOT hold-and-win)

name: Grid Choice
description: Player chooses reel layout or grid configuration

name: Expanding Reels
description: Reel grid grows/expands during play

name: Shifting Reels
description: Reels shift position during gameplay

name: Mystery Feature
description: Randomly triggered bonus or modifier

name: Split Symbols
description: Symbols split into multiple matching symbols
